note: STEM Creators Nexus — a curated directory of top STEM content creators across platforms. Verify links before sharing with younger viewers; external channels are not part of the Skynet kid-safe editorial pipeline.

creators.name: Veritasium
creators.description: Deep, beautifully-shot science explainers that make hard ideas click.

creators.name: Mark Rober
creators.description: Former NASA engineer building glitter bombs, squirrel mazes, and giant builds.
